steps.title: Use the standard-feature clue
steps.content: The passage says ablution areas are almost always included in mosque designs and calls these features standard. The blank needs a word for a defining or characteristic feature.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content:
• Choice A means a copy, not a defining feature.
  • Choice B means a reason for action, not an architectural characteristic.
  • Choice C means refusal, which conflicts with something consistently included.

steps.title: Choose the feature word
steps.content: Hallmark means a distinctive characteristic, matching a feature that is almost always included in mosque architecture. The answer is D.
